overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character in a white hoodie with a spider emblem exploring a university campus modeled after Columbia University. The character walks from a lower cobblestone plaza past a large spherical sculpture, ascends the grand marble stairs of Low Memorial Library, and explores the upper campus plaza with views of the city skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: university campus lower plaza with central sculpture

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the cobblestone path toward the library building, passing pedestrians on the left

notable_agents.action: man carrying a shopping bag walking in the same direction

entered.detail: large neoclassical building with domed roof and tall ionic columns
large dark green spherical sculpture on circular stone pedestal
red brick university building with multiple windows flanking the plaza
red brick university building with multiple windows flanking the plaza

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a cobblestone path in a university campus plaza, approaching the grand Low Memorial Library. A large green spherical sculpture sits on a pedestal to the right, while pedestrians stroll through the open area surrounded by red brick academic buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand marble staircase leading to library entrance

events.description: transition from cobblestone plaza to wide marble staircase
Alma Mater statue becomes visible at the top of the stairs

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide marble stairs toward the columned entrance, weaving between other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person descending the stairs while walking down the center

entered.detail: bronze statue group on stone pedestal with 'ALMA MATER' inscription
tall ionic columns supporting the library portico

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the grand marble staircase toward the library entrance. The building's massive columns and dome dominate the view overhead. The Alma Mater statue comes into view at the landing, while other students and pedestrians move up and down the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper campus plaza with fountain and city views

events.description: reaches top of stairs and turns away from building into open upper plaza
character turns right to walk across the brick-patterned plaza toward the fountain

agents.ego_description: walking across the upper plaza away from the library, turning to observe the campus fountain and city skyline

entered.detail: circular fountain in the center of the upper plaza with water jets
tall urban buildings and skyscrapers visible beyond the campus trees

segments.scene_description: Having reached the top of the stairs, the character turns away from the library and walks across the upper campus plaza. The scene opens up to reveal a central fountain and distant city skyline beyond the red brick patterned ground, with students gathered and walking through the space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling lower campus plaza up to an elevated vantage point overlooking the city skyline. It begins with the character walking along a cobblestone path past a large green spherical sculpture and red brick academic buildings. As the character moves forward, the perspective shifts upward to ascend a grand marble staircase, where massive columns and a dome loom overhead and the Alma Mater statue appears at the landing. The scene then opens up as the character reaches the summit and turns away from the library to cross the upper plaza. Finally, the view expands across a central fountain and red brick grounds to reveal the distant city skyline beyond the campus.
